| 1 | MC_PLAN_ID | Managed Care Plan Identification Number | 

 | 2 | MC_PLAN_NAME | Managed Care Plan Name | 

 | 3 | STATE_CD | Submitting State Alpha Abbreviation | 

 | 4 | SUBMTG_STATE_CD | Submitting State FIPS Code | 

 | 5 | CMS_RGN | CMS Region for Submitting State | 

 | 6 | MC_PLAN_PGM_CD | Managed Care Plan Program Code | 

 | 7 | MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD | Managed Care Plan Type Code | 

 | 8 | MC_PLAN_TYPE_CTGRY_CD | Managed Care Plan Type Category Code | 

 | 9 | MC_PLAN_REIMBRSMT_TYPE_CD
